glosses.ja: 発表する; 紹介する

sentences.target: Ich muss morgen unser Projekt präsentieren.

translations.de: Ich muss morgen unser Projekt präsentieren.
translations.en: I have to present our project tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana tengo que presentar nuestro proyecto.
translations.fr: Je dois présenter notre projet demain.
translations.it: Domani devo presentare il nostro progetto.
translations.zh-Hans: 明天我要汇报我们的项目。
translations.yue: 我聽日要匯報我哋個項目。
translations.ru: Завтра мне нужно представить наш проект.
translations.pt: Amanhã tenho que apresentar nosso projeto.
translations.he: מחר אני צריך להציג את הפרויקט שלנו.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi phải trình bày dự án của chúng tôi.
translations.nl: Morgen moet ik ons project presenteren.
translations.uk: Завтра я маю презентувати наш проєкт.
translations.hu: Holnap be kell mutatnom a projektünket.
translations.hi: कल मुझे हमारा प्रोजेक्ट प्रस्तुत करना है।
translations.el: Αύριο πρέπει να παρουσιάσω το έργο μας.
translations.nb: I morgen må jeg presentere prosjektet vårt.
translations.id: Besok aku harus mempresentasikan proyek kami.
translations.sv: Imorgon måste jag presentera vårt projekt.
translations.ro: Mâine trebuie să prezint proiectul nostru.
translations.da: I morgen skal jeg præsentere vores projekt.
translations.ja: 明日、私たちのプロジェクトを発表しなきゃいけない。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular nominative personal pronoun functioning as the clause subject.
Finite modal auxiliary (1sg present) selecting a bare infinitive; expresses necessity.
Temporal adverb indicating the time of the event.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Projekt'; neuter singular accusative form.
Neuter noun serving as the direct (accusative) object of 'präsentieren'.
Bare infinitive main verb licensed by the modal 'muss'; appears clause-final.

sentences.target: Lisa will den Bericht gleich präsentieren.

translations.de: Lisa will den Bericht gleich präsentieren.
translations.en: Lisa wants to present the report right away.
translations.es: Lisa quiere presentar el informe ahora mismo.
translations.fr: Lisa veut présenter le rapport tout de suite.
translations.it: Lisa vuole presentare il rapporto subito.
translations.ko: 리사는 보고서를 지금 바로 발표하고 싶어 한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 丽莎想马上把报告给大家讲一讲。
translations.yue: Lisa 想而家就匯報份報告。
translations.ru: Лиза хочет прямо сейчас представить отчёт.
translations.pt: Lisa quer apresentar o relatório agora mesmo.
translations.he: ליסה רוצה להציג את הדוח מיד.
translations.vi: Lisa muốn trình bày báo cáo ngay lập tức.
translations.nl: Lisa wil het verslag meteen presenteren.
translations.hu: Lisa azonnal szeretné bemutatni a jelentést.
translations.hi: लीसा अभी तुरंत रिपोर्ट प्रस्तुत करना चाहती है।
translations.pl: Lisa chce od razu zaprezentować raport.
translations.el: Η Λίζα θέλει να παρουσιάσει την έκθεση αμέσως.
translations.nb: Lisa vil presentere rapporten med en gang.
translations.id: Lisa ingin mempresentasikan laporan sekarang juga.
translations.ro: Lisa vrea să prezinte raportul chiar acum.
translations.da: Lisa vil præsentere rapporten med det samme.
translations.ja: リサはすぐに報告書を発表したい。

tokens.explanation: Proper name serving as the nominative subject (3sg).
Finite modal auxiliary (3sg present) selecting a bare infinitive; expresses volition.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; modifies 'Bericht' as direct object.
Masculine noun; direct (accusative) object of 'präsentieren'.
Temporal adverb meaning 'right away'; modifies the predicate.
Bare infinitive main verb selected by 'will'.

sentences.target: Heute darf ich meine Bilder präsentieren.

translations.de: Heute darf ich meine Bilder präsentieren.
translations.en: Today I’m allowed to present my pictures.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, j’ai le droit de présenter mes photos.
translations.it: Oggi posso presentare le mie foto.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我可以展示我的照片。
translations.yue: 今日我可以展示我啲相。
translations.ru: Сегодня я могу представить свои фотографии.
translations.pt: Hoje eu posso apresentar minhas fotos.
translations.he: היום מותר לי להציג את התמונות שלי.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi được phép trưng bày ảnh của mình.
translations.nl: Vandaag mag ik mijn foto’s presenteren.
translations.uk: Сьогодні я можу презентувати свої фотографії.
translations.hi: आज मुझे अपनी तस्वीरें प्रस्तुत करने की अनुमति है।
translations.el: Σήμερα μου επιτρέπεται να παρουσιάσω τις φωτογραφίες μου.
translations.nb: I dag får jeg presentere bildene mine.
translations.id: Hari ini saya diizinkan untuk memamerkan foto-foto saya.
translations.sv: Idag får jag visa mina bilder.
translations.ro: Astăzi am voie să îmi prezint fotografiile.
translations.da: I dag må jeg præsentere mine billeder.
translations.ja: 今日は自分の写真を展示してもいい。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb indicating that the event happens today.
Finite modal auxiliary (1sg present) selecting a bare infinitive; expresses permission.
1st-person singular nominative personal pronoun functioning as the subject.
Possessive determiner agreeing with plural 'Bilder' in accusative; modifies the noun.
Plural noun serving as the direct (accusative) object of 'präsentieren'.
Bare infinitive main verb licensed by the modal 'darf'.

sentences.target: Der Chef lässt mich das Konzept präsentieren.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ʃɛf lɛst mɪç das kɔnˈtsɛpt pʁɛzɛnˈtiːʁən/

translations.de: Der Chef lässt mich das Konzept präsentieren.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ʃɛf lɛst mɪç das kɔnˈtsɛpt pʁɛzɛnˈtiːʁən/
translations.en: The boss is letting me present the concept.
translations.es: El jefe me deja presentar el concepto.
translations.fr: Le patron me laisse présenter le concept.
translations.it: Il capo mi lascia presentare il concetto.
translations.ko: 상사가 내가 콘셉트를 발표하게 해 준다.
translations.zh-Hans: 老板让我来介绍这个概念。
translations.yue: 老細畀我去介紹個概念。
translations.pt: O chefe está me deixando apresentar o conceito.
translations.he: המנהל נותן לי להציג את הקונספט.
translations.vi: Sếp đang cho phép tôi trình bày ý tưởng.
translations.nl: De baas laat me het concept presenteren.
translations.hu: A főnök megengedi, hogy bemutassam a koncepciót.
translations.hi: बॉस मुझे अवधारणा प्रस्तुत करने दे रहा है।
translations.el: Το αφεντικό μου επιτρέπει να παρουσιάσω την ιδέα.
translations.ro: Șeful mă lasă să prezint conceptul.
translations.ja: 上司が私にコンセプトを発表させてくれている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; modifies 'Chef' as the subject.
Masculine noun serving as the nominative subject of 'lässt'.
Finite causative auxiliary (3sg present) selecting an accusative causee ('mich') and a bare infinitive ('präsentieren').
1st-person singular accusative personal pronoun; object of 'lässt' and semantic subject of the infinitival verb.
Definite article, accusative neuter singular; modifies 'Konzept' as the object within the infinitival clause.
Neuter noun functioning as the direct object of 'präsentieren' in the causative construction.
Bare infinitive verb complement of 'lässt'; denotes the action performed by 'mich'.
